creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Hello, again.
Having not gotten any further hints. I dusted off yet some more old
hardware, and performed a fresh install -- same scenareo, only difference
is I used the 8.4-AMD64-dvd1.iso, as the hardware I'm installing to
is an Athlon 64 X2 dualcore, on an MSI board. make.conf(5), and
src.conf(5) are both empty.
As I feared, dns/yadifa failed make install.
Please find attached the output of script make install (yadifa-make-install).
I also have the output of the make(1) process, if you (or anyone)
feels it will help.

Best wishes.

--Chris
